untranslatable_reason: Signal requires comparison between nearby and deferred delivery month futures prices (spread analysis), which requires multi-contract data and relative strength comparisons not available in single-instrument indicator set. The concept of 'nearby delivery months are rising faster than deferred months' requires inter-month spread momentum tracking that cannot be expressed with standard single-contract technical indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation using trend confirmation (price above SMA_20 and ADX > 25 for bull trend), but this does not capture the core bull spread mechanics (long nearby/short deferred) or the relative outperformance of nearby vs deferred months. A proper implementation would require custom spread indicators or multi-contract data feeds.
